body:
Hey %contact_first_name%,

If your plans, budget, or preferred area have changed, I can quickly update your search so you only see the most relevant homes.

Here’s your current home list:

Would you like me to tweak it for you?
subject: Re: Want me to update your home search, %contact_first_name%?
